_comment: SFX manifest for Pledge & Crown diegetic sound effects. Each entry generates one WAV under game/assets/audio/sfx/<name>.wav via AudioLDM2 (cvssp/audioldm2). AudioLDM2 outputs 16 kHz MONO (NOT 44.1 kHz stereo like synthwave-gen). Prompts are descriptive natural language - AudioLDM2's preferred style - not the comma-tag style of music models. Seeds are pinned so re-runs reproduce; bump a seed for a fresh take. Per-sfx `steps` and `negative_prompt` override the _default_* keys. Edit prompts freely - re-run generate.py to overwrite. LICENSE: AudioLDM2 weights are CC-BY-NC; treat output as prototype-only until licensing is confirmed (see README.md).
_default_negative_prompt: music, melody, song, speech, voice, vocals, low quality, noisy, hum, hiss, distorted

sfx.name: door_creak
sfx.prompt: a heavy wooden door creaking open slowly on rusty iron hinges, echoing stone castle interior, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, footsteps, low quality, noisy

sfx.name: door_open
sfx.prompt: a wooden village house door swinging open and a soft latch release, a short clean thud as it stops, quiet indoor ambiance, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy

sfx.name: parchment_unfurl
sfx.prompt: an old parchment scroll being unrolled and unfurled, dry crinkling and rustling of aged paper, quiet medieval study, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy, reverb

sfx.name: footsteps_stone
sfx.prompt: slow deliberate footsteps of leather boots walking on a cobblestone floor, four steps, echoing stone castle hall, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy

sfx.name: coin_clink
sfx.prompt: a handful of small gold coins clinking and jingling together as they drop onto a wooden table, bright metallic chime, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy, reverb

sfx.name: sword_unsheathe
sfx.prompt: a steel sword being drawn from a leather scabbard, sharp metallic ringing slide, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy

sfx.name: anvil_clang
sfx.prompt: a blacksmith hammer striking a hot iron anvil, single bright metallic clang with a long ringing decay, smithy workshop, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy

sfx.name: quill_scratch
sfx.prompt: a feather quill pen scratching across parchment writing a line of ink, soft dry scribbling, quiet medieval scriptorium, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy, reverb

sfx.name: latch_click
sfx.prompt: a small iron door latch clicking shut, a crisp mechanical metal click and snap, single isolated sound effect, mono
sfx.negative_prompt: music, melody, speech, voice, low quality, noisy, reverb
